title: Broken arm or wrist - NHS
text:
cast feels too tight or too loose your fingers, wrist and arm start to feel numb your fingers, wrist and arm look swollen or turn blue or white there's a bad smell or discharge of liquid from under your cast You can call 111 or get help from 111 online .
Page last reviewed: 26 May 2023
Next review due: 26 May 2026
